data.title: Budget Tracker
data.statement:
A student is trying to save up money for a new game over 7 days. Calculate their total weekly allowance, total expenses, and overall savings.

Note: This problem uses basic arithmetic, just sum the values and find the difference.

testCases.title: Standard Values
testCases.testOut:
Total Allowance: 4250
Total Expenses: 2850
Weekly Savings: 1400

testCases.title: Validator 1
testCases.testOut:

Total Expenses: 27
Weekly Savings: 14

testCases.testOut:

Total Expenses: 450
Weekly Savings: 450

Total Expenses: 6
Weekly Savings: 0

testCases.title: Validator 4

data.inputDescription:
<<First 7 values:>> Daily allowances for Monday to Sunday.
<<Next 7 values:>> Daily expenses for Monday to Sunday.
data.outputDescription:
<<Line 1:>> Obtained the Total Allowance.
<<Line 2:>> Obtained the Total Expenses.
<<Line 3:>> Obtained the Weekly Savings.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

A student is trying to save up money for a new game over 7 days. Calculate their total weekly allowance, total expenses, and overall savings.

Note: This problem uses basic arithmetic, just sum the values and find the difference.
Input
First 7 values: Daily allowances for Monday to Sunday.
Next 7 values: Daily expenses for Monday to Sunday.
Output
Line 1: Obtained the Total Allowance.
Line 2: Obtained the Total Expenses.
Line 3: Obtained the Weekly Savings.
Constraints
Example
Input
500
600
450
550
700
800
650
300
400
250
350
500
600
450
Output
Total Allowance: 4250
Total Expenses: 2850
Weekly Savings: 1400
